news.title: New Clarity Act emerges that's a start on the final draft, makes ethics rule temporary
Revolut hits $115 billion valuation in employee share sale: WSJ
SEC's Peirce warns some DeFi vaults, onchain lending may fall under securities laws
UK digital bond plans hinge on one missing piece: onchain cash
Crypto Long & Short: The crypto question isn't what to own — it's what you can survive holding
SEC reaches settlement with Coinbase over records requests from Gensler era
news.summary: The SEC reached a settlement with Coinbase on Wednesday, ending a years-long legal dispute over the agency's handling of records requests.

news.title: Senate releases latest version of Clarity Act including software developer protections and ethics provision with ‘sunset’ date in 2029
news.summary: After months of deliberations, Republicans released the latest text for broader cryptocurrency legislation.

news.title: Crypto directly employs 34,000 in the US and contributes $55 billion to the economy: NCA report
news.summary: Crypto directly employs 34,000 in the U.S. and contributes $55 billion to the economy in 2026, according to an NCA-funded report.

news.title: Crypto ‘wrench attacks’ persist as total climbs to 52 and value targeted jumps more than tenfold, CertiK says
news.summary: CertiK recommends limiting public information that connects a person’s identity, location or routine to their crypto holdings.

news.title: ‘You will have a painful fall’: SEC’s Peirce warns crypto vault builders against twisting securities law
news.summary: Hester Peirce, aka "Crypto Mom", issued a statement clarifying that onchain vaults and lending may fall under the SEC's remit.

news.title: Benchmark lowers Coinbase earnings estimates but says Clarity Act could eclipse weak second quarter
news.summary: Coinbase trading activity stabilized in June after crypto spot volumes slumped throughout most of the quarter.

news.title: Hugging Face CEO Thanks Chinese AI for Saving the Day After OpenAI Hack
news.summary: When American commercial AI refused to help investigate the breach, Hugging Face ran Chinese model GLM 5.2 locally. Its CEO now says there's an important lesson in this.

news.title: US Seizes More Than $25M in Crypto Tied to Investment and Romance Scams
news.summary: Prosecutors filed five forfeiture cases as Secret Service agents traced funds from thousands of victims to launderers in Southeast Asia.

news.title: Digital Chamber sues Illinois officials over new state 0.2% crypto tax
news.summary: The group alleged that the tax signed into law in June “discriminates against people who transact in digital assets“ and should be blocked from implementation and enforcement.

news.title: BitGo, OTC Markets plan tokenized securities access for broker-dealers
news.summary: The proposed alliance would enable more than 150 broker-dealers to trade and settle digital asset securities through OTC Link ATS using BitGo’s custody infrastructure.

news.title: Bitcoin price avoids major Iran jitters as S&P 500 ‘short squeeze’ on horizon
news.summary: Bitcoin and US stocks stayed strong in the face of US-Iran escalation as analysis predicted BTC price action outperforming equities later.

news.title: help me withdraw please
news.summary:
Hi everyone,

Does anyone know of a good way to withdraw my money? I have USDT, but I have no idea how to cash it out. I live in Spain, and my funds are basically stuck because I don't really understand how any of this works.

I'm a freelancer, and one of my clients occasionally pays me in USDT, so I'm just looking for the easiest way to convert it into euros and withdraw it to my bank account.
